title: Ultra FPS
description: Get the maximum FPS your PC can possibly achieve
body:
![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/077350164935cd4e2fcdca0cf5c7968218d339fe.png)
**This build is optimized for every aspect of the game - from lighting and rendering to redstone and game mechanics - delivering insanely high FPS, even on low-end PCs. It features a brand-new next-generation optimization mod included in the pack that pushes Minecraft performance even further**
